    • LinkedIn

Enrollment in Medicare

Source: R/execute.R
enrolled.Rd

Enrollment data on individual and organizational providers that are actively approved to bill Medicare.

Usage

enrolled(
  npi = NULL,
  pac = NULL,
  enid = NULL,
  first = NULL,
  middle = NULL,
  last = NULL,
  prov_type = NULL,
  prov_desc = NULL,
  state = NULL,
  org_name = NULL,
  multi = NULL,
  count = FALSE,
  set = FALSE
)

Arguments

npi

<int> National Provider Identifier

pac

<chr> PECOS Associate Control ID

enid

<chr> Medicare Enrollment ID

first, middle, last

<chr> Individual provider's name

prov_type

<chr> Enrollment specialty code

prov_desc

<chr> Enrollment specialty description

state

<chr> Enrollment state, full or abbreviation

org_name

<chr> Organizational provider's name

multi

<lgl> Provider has multiple NPIs

count

<lgl> Return the total row count

set

<lgl> Return the entire dataset

Value

A tibble

References

  • API: Medicare Provider Supplier Enrollment

  • Provider Enrollment Data Dictionary

Examples

enrolled(count = TRUE)
#> ℹ providers has 2,981,799 rows.
enrolled(count = TRUE, org_name = not_blank())
#> ℹ providers has 433,496 rows.
enrolled()
#> ! providers ❯ No Query
#> ℹ Returning first 10 rows...
#>           NPI MULTIPLE_NPI_FLAG PECOS_ASCT_CNTL_ID       ENRLMT_ID
#> 1  1003879883                 N         8022920719 I20031103000001
#> 2  1003976986                 N         7113839812 I20031103000005
#> 3  1407802119                 N         8022920727 I20031103000007
#> 4  1831165075                 N         5193637890 I20031103000013
#> 5  1851357214                 N         2466364161 I20031103000014
#> 6  1083766935                 N         5092627794 I20031103000015
#> 7  1083835177                 N         5991617698 I20031103000020
#> 8  1720297963                 N         7618889312 I20031103000028
#> 9  1497881189                 N         1254243959 I20031103000030
#> 10 1437155520                 N         9234041930 I20031103000032
#>    PROVIDER_TYPE_CD                   PROVIDER_TYPE_DESC STATE_CD  FIRST_NAME
#> 1             14-16 PRACTITIONER - OBSTETRICS/GYNECOLOGY       PR     ANTONIO
#> 2             14-68 PRACTITIONER - CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGIST       PA CHRISTOPHER
#> 3             14-93    PRACTITIONER - EMERGENCY MEDICINE       PA     KADISHA
#> 4             14-16 PRACTITIONER - OBSTETRICS/GYNECOLOGY       PR       JORGE
#> 5             14-30  PRACTITIONER - DIAGNOSTIC RADIOLOGY       KY      RHONDA
#> 6             14-35          PRACTITIONER - CHIROPRACTIC       NJ     TIMOTHY
#> 7             14-41             PRACTITIONER - OPTOMETRY       NJ        ANNA
#> 8             14-26            PRACTITIONER - PSYCHIATRY       NJ       DAMON
#> 9             14-01      PRACTITIONER - GENERAL PRACTICE       PR       ELVIA
#> 10            14-68 PRACTITIONER - CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGIST       MI      ARNOLD
#>    MDL_NAME         LAST_NAME ORG_NAME
#> 1           ALVAREZ RODRIGUEZ         
#> 2         J           ZIEGLER         
#> 3         B              RAPP         
#> 4         A      OSTOLAZA BEY         
#> 5         G           GRISSOM         
#> 6         J          DIECKMAN         
#> 7                         MOY         
#> 8         D           DELSTON         
#> 9    ARELIS             AYALA         
#> 10                 WEINGARDEN         
enrolled(org_name = starts_with("AB"), state = c("TX", "CA"))
#> ✔ providers returned 231 results.
